name: cpig-booleans-00-union-sphere-sphere
description: Phase D4 (operator-attended boolean visual audit). Simplest cell of the matrix: Union of two overlapping CPig tape spheres. Sequence: _SelAll _Delete (doc hygiene) -> _CPigSphere 0,0,0 10 -> _CPigSphere 15,0,0 10 (overlap by 5 units along +x) -> _SelAll _CPigUnion (Union consumes both inputs and creates one composite field). WaitForPenumbraFrame between each op so a hang would Crash the test. Expected visual: a 'peanut' shape -- two spheres merged with a smooth-but-not-blended join at x=7.5. Failure modes to watch (per plan B0): wrong AABB scoping (one sphere clipped), wrong rendered scale, blank viewport (boolean compiled but didn't push).

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D ray-marched signed-distance surface in Rhino showing the Union of two overlapping spheres -- a peanut/dumbbell shape with two bulges joined in the middle. NOT a single sphere, NOT a blank viewport, NOT a wireframe box.

checkpoints.name: cpig-booleans-union-sphere-sphere
checkpoints.description: Union(sphere(0,0,0;r=10), sphere(15,0,0;r=10)) -- a peanut shape spanning roughly [-10..+25] on x.
